title: Kaeley Jade
summary: October 26, 2020 Armed with a soulful, velvety voice, singer/songwriter Kaeley Jade possesses the captivating ability to craft music that is both playful and poignant. Effortlessly blending lush poetry and hooky melodic lines, the Edmonton-based Métis artist creates her own brand of folk-pop that is fresh, polished and vibrant. S...
